titleStmt.title: Letter from W. A. Tait to the Chief Secretary for Ireland, 13 April 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: W. A. Tait

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p:
Letter from W. A. Tait to Augustine Birrell, (1850–1933), the Chief Secretary for Ireland, seeking information on the powers of Ireland's local authorities regarding grants to universities and colleges of higher education.
W. A. Tait was the son of the Scottish physicist, Peter Guthrie Tait (1831-1901).

msIdentifier.collection: NAI: 'Chief Secretary’s Office Registered Papers; CSORP/1916/7310/3

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
72A George Street, Edinburgh. 13th April 1916 Sir Higher Education Will you very kindly refer me to any Blue Book or
other authoritative source of information which details the
powers which Local Authorities in Ireland have to make grants
to Universities and Colleges etc in aid of higher education
and which also records the extent to which these powers have
been exercised in recent years. I am, Sir,
Your obedient Servant W A Tait The Chief Secretary for Ireland,
Dublin Castle. Rep.
Do the Colleges or the National
University publish annual reports?
I.J.T. 15/4/16 Mr Taylor
The Calendars appear to be the
only annual publication
